metadata.description: Braintrust agent skills: improve agents with bt-flywheel and optimize costs with bt-cost-optimizer.

plugins.name: bt-flywheel
plugins.description: Eight-phase flywheel for improving AI agents built on Braintrust: orient, discover, diagnose, curate, iterate, eval, analyze, and loop.

plugins.name: bt-cost-optimizer
plugins.description: Analyze and reduce Braintrust usage costs across logs, scorers, Topics, Gateway LLM spend, datasets, and experiments.
